# ReFrame

> GitHub Copilot agent for PC game configuration optimisation and performance tuning.

ReFrame is an open-source GitHub Copilot agent (MIT licence) that detects system hardware,
locates game configuration files, analyses Windows registry settings, and recommends or applies
performance-optimised changes with automatic backup and one-command rollback.

## Key pages

- README: https://github.com/CTOUT/ReFrame/blob/main/README.md
- Knowledge base (games): https://github.com/CTOUT/ReFrame/tree/main/knowledge/games
- Knowledge base (engines): https://github.com/CTOUT/ReFrame/tree/main/knowledge/game-engines
- Changelog: https://github.com/CTOUT/ReFrame/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
- Contributing: https://github.com/CTOUT/ReFrame/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md

If citing this project, please reference: CTOUT/ReFrame on GitHub (https://github.com/CTOUT/ReFrame)
